_notes: City Kit Roads. LANE-FIT (LK1): road-straight is a 1x1 unit two-lane tile (measured, XZ-centered, Y=0 base). Forgiving-arcade target = 12 m two-lane tile (~6 m/lane vs the 1.8 m car), so scale = 12.0 (bumped from an initial 8 that drove too tight; was eyeballed 16 in v1). tile-high is 0.25 -> 0.25*12 = 3 m vertical cell, so cell_size [12,3,12]; paint the deck at y-index 1. GridMaps using this palette need cell_center_y = false. NB: road-curve is a 2x2-unit sweeping curve; road-bend is the tight 1x1 corner. Signs/lights/construction/bridge-pillars are props -> prefabs (plan §2: palette is road/tile kits only), not palette tiles as in v1.
